holdings.infoBox: TQQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 125 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro QQQ (TQQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index tracking 100 of the largest non-financial firms listed on NASDAQ. TQQQ was launched on Feb 9, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
